title: Tensura_Marionette
body:
Tensura:Reincarnated Version: should work for 1.0.0.4 and higher IMPORTANT!!! Forge Modloader Version: 43.4.6 (if you are using anything below 43.4.6 it WON'T work) 

 Description: This mod adds a crafting recipe for the marionette heart from the Tensura:Reincarnated mod
You will need a Kiln to mix sand and magic crystals as well as silver to mix with magic crystals

recipes should also appear in JEI

Have fun 

 Patch 0.1.3
-Some naming errors were changed
-Premium Quality Magic Crystal added
-Costs for Crystal Silver, Crystal Glass were raised (you need more magic crystal now)
-you can melt Crystal Silver and Crystal Glass back into their original components now

Patch 0.1.4 
-Magic Crystal Blocks are now smeltable
